summary: Plan-only remediation assessment for five independent open PR candidates plus three hydrated linked issues. No security-sensitive signals were present. No merge is recommended because every PR lacks complete merge preflight proof; #90586 also has failing checks and a concrete repair path on the contributor branch.

actions.reason: Ready-looking small PR, but merge cannot be recommended without complete merge preflight and maintainer review proof.
Potentially useful contributor PR, but the diff is medium-sized and final merge proof is incomplete, so maintainer review is required before merge.
A concrete repair path exists on the contributor branch, but failing checks block merge and fixed-by-candidate closeout.
Emit a bounded repair-contributor-branch artifact for #90586 instead of replacing or closing the useful contributor PR.
The PR may be close, but the compact artifact leaves merge readiness ambiguous and merge preflight is incomplete.
Active author follow-up plus unresolved compacted review state requires maintainer judgment before repair or merge.
Keep the issue open and related to #90586 until the candidate PR is repaired, validated, and merged.
Keep the issue open and related to #90489 until the PR has complete merge proof and lands.
Keep the issue open and related to #90537 until the PR has complete merge proof and lands.
